hero.title: Value your property in Marrakech
hero.subtitle: Discover the value of your property thanks to our local market expertise. Contact us for an accurate, personalized valuation.

expert.title: Valuation by an expert
expert.subtitle: Schedule a visit with one of our agents for an accurate valuation.

step1.title: Fill in the form
step1.description: Provide your contact details and the preferred date for the visit.

step2.title: Our agent contacts you
step2.description: An expert calls you to confirm the appointment and prepare the visit.

step3.title: Receive your valuation
step3.description: You'll get an accurate, personalized valuation within 24 hours.

cta.title: Any questions?
cta.subtitle: Our team is available for any question about valuing your property.

intro.title: Value your property

intro.step1Description: Fill in the form with your contact details and preferred date.
intro.step2Description: An expert contacts you to prepare the visit.
